Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add mobile web testing framework for shop-app

- Gradle project with Selenide-Appium, Cucumber, Allure, REST Assured
- DriverFactory: local Appium, BrowserStack, desktop Chrome modes
- Page Objects with real locators from shop-app frontend
- API helpers for test data setup \(AuthApi, ProductApi, CartApi, OrderApi\)
- 17 Cucumber BDD scenarios: login, products, cart, checkout
- Hooks: driver lifecycle, screenshot on failure, Allure attachments
- Smoke and Regression runners with JUnit Platform Suite
- GitHub Actions CI/CD: matrix strategy for Android + iOS on BrowserStack
- Allure report deployment to GitHub Pages
EOF
\)")
